# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Python Application CI/CD Pipeline

stages:
- test
- build
- deploy

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "1"
  BUILD_VERSION: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA
  DEPLOYMENT_TARGET: "production"

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - pytest --cov=app --cov-report=xml --junit-xml=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/junit.xml

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - pip install .[dev] --no-cache-dir
    - python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - poetry run python manage.py deploy
  environment:
    name: $DEPLOYMENT_TARGET
  when: manual

lint:
  stage: lint
  script:
    - flake8 app/ --exclude=venv,__pycache__ --ignore E501,W293
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'
